title: Other PHAC publications - Canada.ca

## Other PHAC publications
https://doi.org/10.24095/hpcdp.37.9.07
Researchers from the Public Health Agency of Canada also contribute to work published in other journals. Look for the following articles published in 2017:
Hennessy D, Garner R, Flanagan WM, Wall R , Nadeau C. Development of a population-based microsimulation model of body mass index. Health Rep. 2017;28(6):20-30.
Poliquin PG , Biondi M , Ranadheera C , Hagan M , Bello A , Racine T , Allan M , […] Jones S , Leung A , Grolla A , Tran KN , Tierney K , Qiu X , Kobasa D , Strong JE . Delivering prolonged intensive care to a non-human primate: a high fidelity animal model of critical illness. Sci Rep. 2017;7(1). doi: 10.1038/s41598-017-01107-6.
Wielgosz A, Dai S , Walsh P , McCrea-Logie J , Celebican E. Comorbid conditions in Canadians hospitalized because of diabetes. Can J Diabetes. 2016. doi: 10.1016/j.jcjd.2017.03.004.
